creator: danny@sauna-joe.nl
text:
On Thursday 11 March 2010 20:02:06 you wrote:
> Maintainer of multimedia/kmplayer,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/144663 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144663
> 

Hi Edwin,

I am no longer maintainer of kmplayer (also kmplayer for kde3 has been 
discontinued). I believe kmplayer for kde4 belongs to kde@, perhaps they want 
kmplayer3 but I wouldn't think so. It's one of those dodo ports :-)

If I'm still listed mainainer in the port's Makefile, please reset. Thanks,

Dan
